service: AI Lead Recovery System — Meta Ads + GHL + Voice AI

challenges.impact: Paying $300/lead then competing against 5–15 roofers for the same homeowner — only one wins, and Angie's profits regardless
100% dependent on one expensive shared source — no owned traffic, no organic, no system that generates leads without writing checks
Lead conversion drops dramatically after just 5–10 minutes. Without instant follow-up, leads book whoever called first — not the best roofer
Quality appointments being lost with no structured nurture between quote and decision, and no automated estimate follow-up
$150/day running for two weeks with no results — not because Meta doesn't work, but because there's no system behind the lead when it arrives

approach.body:
Chris's business has a real edge: 48-hour job completion, on-site project management, premium materials, and an insurance-claim upsell angle most competitors miss. What's missing is a system that generates exclusive leads and works them the moment they come in — so the sales team only shows up to qualified, confirmed appointments.

Phase 1 focuses on one thing: build the core lead engine and get it live. Meta ads generate exclusive leads in Chris's own account. The AI calls within 60 seconds, qualifies using the full roofing checklist, books the inspection, and follows up via SMS until it gets a yes or a firm no. Nothing falls through the cracks.

points.label: Owned Leads — Meta Ads
points.description: Exclusive leads in your own ad account — not shared with competitors. You own the traffic and the relationship from the first click.

points.label: AI Speed-to-Lead
points.description: An outbound voice agent calls within 60 seconds of form submission — at peak buying intent, before they've dialled anyone else. Every qualification question is asked automatically.

points.label: Automated Nurture
points.description: AI SMS setter, appointment reminders, and estimate follow-ups keep leads warm at every stage — so nothing falls through the cracks between quote and signed job.

items.activity: GHL sub-account setup: pipeline, contact tagging, lead source tracking
items.benefit: All leads flow into one owned system — no more competing for leads you already paid for

items.activity: Meta ads campaign build: targeting, ad sets, creative strategy and ad copy
items.benefit: Exclusive leads at buying intent — not recycled and sold to 15 competitors

items.activity: Lead capture form optimised for roofing pre-qualification
items.benefit: Filters lead quality before the AI even picks up the phone
Know exactly which ads are generating booked appointments, not just clicks

items.activity: Outbound voice agent: calls the lead within 60 seconds of form submission
items.benefit: At peak buying intent — before they've called anyone else

items.activity: Custom qualification script: insurance status, roof age, skylights, gutters, slope, pool enclosures, deductible
items.benefit: Asks every question you'd ask on-site — pre-qualified before the appointment hits your calendar

items.activity: Calendar integration (Google Cal or JobNimbus calendar)
items.benefit: Appointment booked directly — zero manual coordination

items.activity: Human handoff trigger: escalates hot leads when a live conversation is needed
items.benefit: AI qualifies, you close — the right division of labour

items.activity: AI SMS conversation agent: responds to replies, handles objections, re-engages cold leads via text
items.benefit: Captures leads that don't answer the phone — keeps the conversation alive until they book
Reduces no-shows — every drive to a property is one that actually sat

items.activity: Post-estimate follow-up sequence (automated nudges when a quote goes quiet)
items.benefit: Stops revenue falling through the cracks between quote and signed job

items.activity: Re-engagement sequence for leads that didn't book on first contact
items.benefit: Recovers leads that weren't ready the first time and keeps Daytona Beach Roofing top of mind

items.activity: Performance dashboard: leads in, appointments booked, close rate, cost per booked appointment
items.benefit: Full visibility into what the system is generating — no guessing, no black box

items.activity: Ad performance monitoring and creative iteration
items.benefit: Ads that aren't converting get replaced — budget goes to what's working

items.activity: Monthly strategy check-in to review numbers and adjust
items.benefit: Regular alignment keeps the system improving and ensures you always know what you're paying for

investment.roi_framing: Ad spend billed directly by Meta — recommended $1,500–2,000/month to start. At a 10% close rate and $30K average job value, two closed jobs in the first month covers setup, retainer, and ad spend combined.

items.deliverable: Part 3: AI SMS Setter & Follow-up Nurture

bonuses.detail: Every week we review booked appointments, close rate, and ad performance together — and adjust strategy based on real data
GTM strategy with a unique angle and messaging — so you enter the market with a position competitors can't copy overnight

bonuses.bonus: Static images, Reviews, Carousels & video scripts
bonuses.detail: Full content creation — crucial since Facebook's Andromeda update made creative quality the #1 performance lever
Before launching, we analyse what other roofers in your market are running — so your creatives don't repeat what's already failing
Prices above already reflect 25% off our standard rate ($7,300 setup + $2,900/month). Saving: $1,800+ on this engagement

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — Setup fee 60% upfront, 40% on delivery
Onboarding — Provide access to Meta Business Manager and create GHL account via our referral link
Kick-off call — 30 minutes to align on qualifying questions, service area, and existing Facebook account before Day 1

terms.detail: Setup fee due upfront. Retainer billed monthly from go-live date
Month-to-month after setup. 30-day written notice to cancel

Covers Parts 1–4 as described. Excluded: ad spend (client's direct Meta expense), JobNimbus CRM integration (Phase 2 — quoted separately), content production (photos/video), changes outside agreed scope after project start
Bug fixes and adjustments included for 14 days post-go-live (3 revision rounds). Change requests outside scope quoted separately
All systems built in client's GHL sub-account and Meta ad account. Arcaflow retains no access after retainer ends
Active Meta Business Manager, phone number for GHL, and calendar access required before project start. Missing access delays the start date
